Event: Darkness Castle Siege Oct 2025

Sage Bot Item Code: A254


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Castle Siege
Shining Boomerang Artifact

Eternal Thunder
The unit unleashes lightning against all enemy units. When the lightning hits, it removes 4 random positive effects from the targets, and casts decay upon targets' armor. Affected units receive 275000 pure damage, and their magic armor is reduced by 30% for 5 sec. This enemy unit also receives 300000 magic damage over 5 sec. When the lightning hits, it also has a 65% chance to cast electric pulse upon every affected unit for 4 sec. Every time a unit affected with electric pulse uses an ability, it is hit with a lightning bolt, which deals 250000 magic damage to it, and to every enemy unit in a small radius around it. All the units that are hit become stunned for 1 sec. Besides, the ability's target has its physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec., and it receives 300000 magic damage over 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
